title: maysida Kids Cash Register Toy Playset, Toddler Prentend Play Store with Real Calculator Cash Register with Scanner/Credit Card/Play Money/Food, Learning Toys for Boys Girls Toddlers(Pink)
features: 🔢[Cash register toy for kids] The cash register toy comes with a real calculator, helping kids to learn basic math, count money skills and develop communication skills! kids can pretend to play grocery store games with friends or for fun family time.It is a must-have toy for toddlers 4-8 as a eductional gift.

🔢[Multifunctional calculator playset with piano key & alarm sound & led light] This pretend play set has multiple function modes to enjoy fun, including smart lights, piano music and realistic alarm sound effects. When toddlers scan paly food and press the button, it will emit cool lights! When the calculator is switched to piano mode, kids can freely simulate playing the piano; kids can also simulate the supermarket to catch the thief scene to press the alarm button, which is very interesting.

🔢[Educational STEM Toys ] Suitable for ages 3 and up, this cash register is perfect for tiny to unleash imaginations while improving fine motor skills, counting math and makeing little one can be store clerks or customers just like in a real supermarket.

🔢[Perfect safe and durable gifts for kids] It is a perfect chocie for your preschoolers/toddlers ages 4-8 as a birthday/Christmas/party/Halloween gift, which is made of high-quality, non-toxic and durable materials with soft edges and brightly colored shells. Kids love shopping games, so get them this surprise gifts!
